kill_clip.name: Kill Clip
kill_clip.description: Reloading after a kill grants +25% damage for a brief window.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: After 12 seconds in continuous combat, +15% damage (also improves handling and reload).

surrounded.name: Surrounded
surrounded.description: +40% damage when 3 or more enemies are nearby.

explosive_light.name: Explosive Light
explosive_light.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants +25% damage for the next shot or short burst.

bait_and_switch.name: Bait and Switch
bait_and_switch.description: Deal damage with all three equipped weapons within a short window to activate +35% damage.

target_lock.name: Target Lock (Max)
target_lock.description: Damage increases with continuous fire, ramping up to +40% at max stacks.

golden_tricorn_x2.name: Golden Tricorn ×2
golden_tricorn_x2.description: ×2 stack (weapon kill of matching element): +15% damage.

golden_tricorn_x3.name: Golden Tricorn ×3
golden_tricorn_x3.description: ×3 stack (ability kill of matching element): +50% damage.

rampage_x1.name: Rampage ×1
rampage_x1.description: 1 stack (1 kill): +10% damage for a short duration.

vorpal_weapon.name: Vorpal Weapon
vorpal_weapon.description: +15% damage against bosses, vehicles, and Guardians with their Super active.

firing_line.name: Firing Line
firing_line.description: +25% precision damage when near two or more allies aiming at the same target.

swashbuckler_x5.name: Swashbuckler ×5
swashbuckler_x5.description: Max stacks (5 rapid kills or 4 kills + 1 melee): +33% damage.

trench_barrel.name: Trench Barrel
trench_barrel.description: After a melee hit, the next 3 shots deal +50% damage with improved handling. Shotgun only.

one_two_punch.name: One-Two Punch
one_two_punch.description: Hitting an enemy with every pellet in a shot briefly grants +50% melee damage. Shotgun only.

desperado.name: Desperado
desperado.description: After a precision kill that empties the magazine, the next magazine deals +40% damage. Pulse rifles only.

adrenaline_junkie_x5.name: Adrenaline Junkie ×5
adrenaline_junkie_x5.description: Max stacks (5 grenade kills or rapid weapon kills): +25% damage.

successful_warm_up.name: Successful Warm-Up (Max)
successful_warm_up.description: Max stacks (5 rapid kills): +33% damage on linear fusion rifles.

high_ground.name: High Ground
high_ground.description: +10% weapon damage when shooting at targets that are below you.

radiant.name: Radiant
radiant.description: Solar subclass empowering buff. +10% weapon damage against all targets. Does not stack with other empowering buffs.

empowering_rift.name: Empowering Rift
empowering_rift.description: Warlock empowering rift. +20% weapon damage while active. Does not stack with other empowering buffs.

weapons_of_light.name: Weapons of Light
weapons_of_light.description: Titan Ward of Dawn bubble perk. +25% weapon damage for all guardians inside. Does not stack with other empowering buffs.

well_of_radiance.name: Well of Radiance
well_of_radiance.description: Warlock Well of Radiance super. +25% weapon damage while standing in the well. Does not stack with other empowering buffs.

banner_shield.name: Banner Shield
banner_shield.description: Titan Banner Shield super. +35% weapon damage for allies near the banner. Does not stack with other empowering buffs.

lumina_noble_rounds.name: Noble Rounds (Lumina)
lumina_noble_rounds.description: Lumina exotic hand cannon. Allies receiving Noble Rounds get +35% weapon damage. Does not stack with other empowering buffs.

weaken.name: Weaken
weaken.description: Void debuff on the target. Weakened enemies take +15% damage from all sources. Applied by Hunter tether (partial), Volatile Rounds, and various exotic perks.

tether.name: Shadowshot Tether
tether.description: Void Hunter Shadowshot super. Tethered enemies take +30% damage from all sources.

divinity.name: Divinity
divinity.description: Divinity exotic trace rifle. Targets caught in the cage take +15% damage and have a large, easily crittable weak point.
